name: CEL_EXTERNAL_VENDORS
description: Table to store setup for integration with external vendors.

columns.Name: VENDOR_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that identifies the vendor for external rewards management

columns.Name: ACCOUNT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Code that identifies the type of vendor account

columns.Name: CONTENT_ID
columns.Comments: Universal content management identifier of stored illustration

columns.Name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y/N to indicate if the integration is enabled

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_POINTS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Y/N to indicate if points withdrawal is enabled or not

columns.Name: CLIENT_USERNAME
columns.Comments: Username or Identifier of the client account with vendor

columns.Name: CLIENT_SECRET
columns.Comments: Secret for the client account with vendor

columns.Name: CLIENT_KEY
columns.Comments: Key for the client, such as key to the rewards gallery

columns.Name: VENDOR_URL2
columns.Comments: Alternate URL for the vendor, such as for rewards gallery

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
